title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Porter

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Porter
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!
